nasb.text: Now the sons of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel, were Mesha his firstborn, who was the father of Ziph; and his son was Mareshah, the father of Hebron.

esv.text: The sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel: Mareshah his firstborn, who fathered Ziph. The son of Mareshah: Hebron.

cnv.text: 耶拉篾的兄弟迦勒的子孫如下：他的長子是米沙，是西弗的父親；他的兒子是瑪利沙，是希伯崙的父親。

ccb.text: 耶拉篾的兄弟迦勒的长子是西弗的父亲米沙，希伯仑的父亲玛利沙也是迦勒的儿子。
